cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is on a long 10-meter training leash in an open, empty park. The dog is sniffing the ground a few meters away from the owner. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A wide shot establishing the open environment and the freedom the long leash provides.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The owner calls the dog with an enthusiastic, high-pitched 'Vem!'. The dog's head snaps up, and it immediately turns and starts running towards the owner, ignoring the interesting smells. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A quick zoom in on the dog's head as it reacts to the call, followed by a tracking shot as it begins to run.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The dog reaches the owner and is met with a huge celebration, a 'treat party' where multiple high-value treats are thrown on the ground for the dog to find. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A fun, low-angle shot of the dog excitedly finding and eating the scattered treats. A 'FESTA!' text graphic animates on screen.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A diagram showing the owner as the 'Most Interesting Thing in the Park'. Arrows from distractions (squirrel, other dog, frisbee) are shown bouncing off a 'Focus Shield' around the owner. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The distraction arrows animate, hitting the shield and deflecting, while the owner icon glows brightly, symbolizing high value.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog running joyfully towards its owner in a beautiful, sunny field, the epitome of a reliable recall. Text overlay: 'Seja Sempre a Melhor Aventura do Seu Cão'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A cinematic, slow-motion shot of the dog running, with lens flare from the sun. The text fades in with a beautiful, flowing font.
